titleStmt.title: SII 9.201: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 201. (A.R. No. 99 of 1904.) ON THE 15TH SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 46, Plava, Taḷiramāvāsye, Ādityavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1122 March 10 Friday (not Sunday), when there was a solar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva. The Daṇḍanāyaka Sōvarasa, chief of Bannigōḷa, made a gift of a portion of toll-revenue for the service of the god Kalidēva, while Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja para
mēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābhara
ṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salluttami
re tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahā
maṇḍaḷēśvara kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi su
bhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārtaṇḍaṁ paricchīdigaṇḍaṁ rājiga
cōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁga(ṁ)nnā mā
disamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuvana
mallapāṇḍyadēvarṇnoḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigraha
viśiṣṭapratipāḷana(ṁ)mmāḍi sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhipati ma
hāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ siṣṭēṣṭajanatuṣṭidāyakaṁ haracara
ṇasarasīruhamadhukaraṁ vinayaratnākaraṁ viyōgayō
gandharaṁ patikāryyadhuraṁdharaṁ nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī
manmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ bannigōḷada prabhu sōvarasar
noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsirada vaḍḍarāvuḷada suṁkamanāḷdu
sukhadinire śrīcāḷukyavikramavarṣada 46 neya plavasaṁ
vatsarada taḷiramāvāsyeyādityavāra sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu śrīma
dayvadiṁbara sannidhānadoḷ vaḍḍarāvuḷada suṁka lakhkhakke
Āṟu paṇa muppāgadoḷage śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvasvāmi
dēvaragrāsanada satrakke biṭṭa pāgavoṁdu Ī dharmmamaṁ
pratipālisidavargge prayāgevāraṇāsikurukṣētradoḷ
sāsirbbarvvēdaśāstrapāragargge sāsira kavileyanubhayamukhigoṭṭa pha
lamakkuvī dharmmamanaḷidātanā puṇyasthānadoḷā brāhmaṇaru
mananitu kavileyumanaḷida mahāpātakanakku . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . saṁdātātsamahatsakhyaṁ duḥkhamanya
tra pālanaṁ dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānātśrēyōnupālanāt .
Digital edition of SII 9.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
